channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: src/__tests__/ — dead-code-hunter Directory Structure
item.description: Directory listing for src/__tests__/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.description: Directory listing for src/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.title: DeadCodeAnalysis Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Manages the logic for filtering and interpreting dead code candidates received from the SDK. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeAnalysis domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The core entry point and integration layer that handles the GitHub workflow environment and orchestration. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: Reporting Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Transforms raw analysis data into human-readable Markdown for GitHub communication. Architectural overview of the Reporting domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The external dependency providing the core static analysis and call-graph capabilities. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ActionEntry — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Handles the main execution loop and global error handling. Architecture documentation for the ActionEntry subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: DiffScoping — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Matches analysis findings against the list of changed files in a PR. Architecture documentation for the DiffScoping subdomain (part of DeadCodeAnalysis domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: InputConfiguration — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Processes action.yml configuration and environment variables. Architecture documentation for the InputConfiguration subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ResultFiltering — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Implements logic to exclude specific files or directories from reports. Architecture documentation for the ResultFiltering subdomain (part of DeadCodeAnalysis domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
